statements.sql: UPDATE tgt SET tgt.EnglishProductName = src.ProductName, tgt.LastSeenDate = GETDATE() FROM silver.UpdateJoinTarget AS tgt INNER JOIN bronze.Product AS src ON tgt.ProductAlternateKey = CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25))

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT tgt.ProductAlternateKey, src.ProductName AS EnglishProductName, GETDATE() AS LastSeenDate FROM [silver].[UpdateJoinTarget] AS tgt INNER JOIN [bronze].[Product] AS src ON tgt.ProductAlternateKey = CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25))
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH source_product AS ( SELECT * FROM [bronze].[Product] ), existing_target AS ( SELECT * FROM [silver].[UpdateJoinTarget] ), updated AS ( SELECT tgt.ProductAlternateKey, src.ProductName AS EnglishProductName, GETDATE() AS LastSeenDate FROM existing_target tgt INNER JOIN source_product src ON tgt.ProductAlternateKey = CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) ) SELECT * FROM updated
